summary: Fixed 21 leadership records: updated deal_type from careerspan_acquirer to leadership, set external_source to careerspan_leadership_notion
notes_for_orchestrator: Found 22 cs-lead-* records total (not 21 as stated in brief). One record (cs-lead-calendly) already had correct deal_type='leadership' - likely from earlier testing. The UPDATE was idempotent so no harm done. All 22 records now have consistent deal_type='leadership' and external_source='careerspan_leadership_notion'.
